title: Bigamy
content:
There once was an old man of Lyme.
     Who married three wives at a time:
        When asked, "Why a third?"
        He replied, "One's absurd!
     And bigamy, sir, is a crime."
meaning:
"Bigamy" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
